title: PokéGems Legacy pack
description: PokéGems Legacy is a custom Cobblemon Add-on which adds Fakémon from the PokéGems Custom Region Cento into the wonderful world of Cobblemon.
body:
![LogoBannerUpdate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fe2f0b4c0eebf165ec3bd3407932684636590f9.png)
![bumper1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cebc415d189c669ff06bbf360e0349447a661705.png)
Hey **Everyone**, this is the **PokéGems legacy** pack. A culmination of our closed server’s fakemon/npcs for you all to enjoy!

**[V 0.2]** - _This version adds tons of new content including some notable things such as **CUSTOM FOSSILS, NPC TRAINERS, FAKÉMON DROPS,** and **WORMHOLE ENCOUNTERS**!_

### Will this pack get updated?
Yes, I plan to eventually incorporate npc trainer spawns in the wild, and incorporate the servers gimmick burst evolutions in an easy to understand way.

### What does __PokéGems Legacy__ add?
- Adds over 76 unique Fakémon and regional forms!
- Unique Mechanics such as Ultra Wormhole encounters and eventually Burst Evolution
- A Custom Mark (Ultra Wormhole Mark)
- Custom ways to obtain/encounter Fakémon

### Is there a way to get support or ask questions?
Yes in the PokéGems Legacy discord: https://discord.gg/CMV5y6gec3

### Where can I learn about Spawns and Stats? 
You can look at our Wiki Spreadsheet Here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1REglVLqZJ9g9EXkV1ILvELtR0xweumDO3oKysEytk68/edit?usp=sharing

### How do I install the pack?
All you need to do is drop the datapack file into your datapacks folder and then place a copy into the resource pack folder, then you should be all good to go!

### Where are the Burst evolutions? 
In this current version I did not include them as we want to have them be integrated without a sidemod. _(For those that don’t know, burst evolutions is the old servers gimmick - kinda like megas)_

### Can I use this pack on my server? 
Yes, you can even use particular mons from the pack as long as you credit the PokéGems Team.

### Ozzy where did you go?
_Short story:_ I sold my server’s assets (PokéGems) to a particular well known public server, they told the original team that they can continue with the project even though they had purchased the assets. Not that long after, the PokéGems team eventually gave up on the revamp.. They had gotten permission to release the assets. No one wanted to put anything together, now here I am on the team’s behalf!

_**IMPORTANT NOTE:** Any donations go directly to the people who help make this pack, donating directly supports the artists involved._
![bumper2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cebc415d189c669ff06bbf360e0349447a661705.png)
